title: coap_dtn.c: fix piv/ctx capture in deaddrop_post store error path
description: Ensure store error path correctly uses piv/ctx from unprotect for OSCORE protected error response via deaddrop_oscore_respond. Verify no buffer overwrite or ctx NULL cases. Align with main's unprotect logic.
close_reason: Fixed piv/ctx capture and buffer lifetime in deaddrop_post store error path; aligned deaddrop_oscore_respond error handling with keys_oscore_respond; hoisted plain buffer to prevent overwrite; updated condition for piv_len==0 cases. Tests via coap build patterns.
